title: Khoonkhaar
subTitle: Gagan, a brave young man, is unable to be with Sweety, his true love, due to her parents' disapproval of him. However, he vows to protect her after unknowingly saving her from gangsters.

title: Mujhe Kucch Kehna Hai
subTitle: An accident brings Karan and Pooja close to each other. When Karan finally decides to propose to her, he realises that destiny has other plans for them.

title: MP3: Mera Pehla Pehla Pyaar
subTitle: MP3: Mera Pehla Pehla Pyaar

title: Boom
subTitle: Three clueless models bumble their way into the Bombay underworld after hilariously botching a diamond smuggling deal to the Middle East.

title: Crocodile Island
subTitle: Stranded passengers must fight against man-eating crocodiles after their plane makes an emergency landing on a remote island.

title: Phata Poster Nikla Hero
subTitle: Vishwas, the son of a widow, wants to be an actor despite his mother's wish that he become a police inspector. However, his life takes a turn when he gets entangled with a criminal gang.

title: Akhanda
subTitle: When the nefarious Varadarajulu plans to attack Murali Krishna, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, Akhanda leaves no stone unturned to defeat the evil.

title: Karthikeya 2
subTitle: The movie deals with the personal problems of Karthik and how he comes out of them. His pursuit of the truth leads him to find out the power of Indian ancient system and Tatva of Lord Sri Krishna.

title: Ab Tumhare Hawale Watan Saathiyo
subTitle: Kunal falls in love with Shweta and decides to stay in the army to get close to her but soon finds out that she is waiting for her husband Rajeev to return from war.

title: Judaai
subTitle: Shashikant and Gauri get married in honour of his late father's will. But, marital problems soon arise when Gauri suspects him of having an affair, leading to a chain of misunderstandings.

title: Big Dhamaka
subTitle: Two men look alike, with one of them being a successful businessman and the other trying to find work. Despite their differences, they end up falling for the same woman.

title: Big Dhamaka
subTitle: Two men look alike, with one of them being a successful businessman and the other trying to find work. Despite their differences, they end up falling for the same woman.

title: Farrey
subTitle: Brought up in an orphanage, child prodigy Niyati gets admitted into a prestigious school. Soon, surrounded by money, she gets engulfed in a cheating racket.

title: Tarla
subTitle: With dreams bigger than every social barrier known to women, Tarla Dalal embarks on an inspirational journey to change the country's culinary landscape.

title: Bhoot Returns
subTitle: Tarun and Namrata move into a luxurious bungalow with Taman and Nimmi, their son and daughter respectively. However, strange occurrences start taking place and they must escape in order to survive.

title: Kalyug
subTitle: Kunal and Renuka's marital bliss is shattered when a group of people film and upload a video of them being intimate on an adult website. Kunal fights to take them and their illegal racket down.

title: No Entry
subTitle: A gorgeous club dancer's ill-timed rendezvous opens up a Pandora's box of lies, absurdities and misunderstandings in the lives of three quirky couples.

title: Khiladi 786
subTitle: A father who runs a matrimonial agency believes that his son is a failure in life. To prove him wrong, the son takes on the task of finding a match for a gangster's sister.

title: Main Prem Ki Diwani Hoon
subTitle: Sanjana falls in love with Prem Kishen after mistaking him for his boss, Prem Kumar, whom she is actually supposed to marry. But, the relationship is threatened when Prem Kishen reveals the truth.

title: Players
subTitle: A master thief stumbles upon a secret lead about a shipment of gold ingots being transported from Russia to Romania. Eventually, he recruits a gang of sly criminals to stage a daring heist.

title: Jai Ho
subTitle: A former Indian military officer devises a unique plan to promote social responsibility amongst apathetic civilians. The masses embrace his initiative, but he must confront a potent political family.

title: Antim: The Final Truth
subTitle: Rahul runs away from his poverty-stricken village life to become a gangster in the city. There, he locks horns with an upstanding policeman who tries to set him on the right path.

title: Antim: The Final Truth
subTitle: Rahul runs away from his poverty-stricken village life to become a gangster in the city. There, he locks horns with an upstanding policeman who tries to set him on the right path.

title: Rang Rasiya
subTitle: A young and talented Raja Ravi Varma trains under the king of Kerala. He moves to Bombay and meets Sugandha, who initially discredits his artwork but later becomes his muse.

title: Khamoshiyan
subTitle: Kabir, a struggling writer, journeys to Kashmir seeking inspiration and takes lodging in a mysterious guesthouse. He finds himself falling for Meera, the enigmatic owner, who harbours a dark secret.

title: Game Paisa Ladki
subTitle: Struggling with the loss of her loved ones, Nazuk becomes entangled with a gangster, planning to extort him and his associates for a reward of 10 crore rupees, setting the stage for a dangerous game.
